cards.title: SpaceX Overtakes Amazon as World's 5th Most Valuable Firm
cards.body: Elon Musk's SpaceX has surpassed Amazon to become the world's fifth most valuable company, driven by its $60 billion AI compute campus push and a soaring private valuation. The company is now unleashing its war chest to solve critical AI infrastructure bottlenecks.
cards.image_search: spacex starship rocket launch pad night fire

threads.hook: 📢 [Fact Check] SpaceX가 아마존을 제치고 세계 5위 기업으로 등극, AI 인프라에 $60B 투자 선언.
threads.detail: SpaceX의 기업가치가 폭등하며 아마존을 추월했습니다. 핵심은 AI 컴퓨팅 캠퍼스 건설에 600억 달러를 쏟아붓겠다는 전략입니다.
threads.question: SpaceX의 AI 인프라 투자, 성공할까요?

cards.title: Leaked OpenAI Financials: $38.5B Loss and Massive Compute Burn
cards.body: Leaked financial documents reveal OpenAI is burning through capital at an unprecedented rate, with cumulative losses reaching $38.5 billion. The company's enormous compute expenditure underscores the staggering cost of training frontier AI models at scale.
cards.image_search: server room data center cooling systems blue lights

threads.hook: 📢 [Exclusive] OpenAI 내부 재무제표 유출 — 누적 손실 385억 달러, 컴퓨트 비용 폭증.
threads.detail: 유출된 재무제표에 따르면 OpenAI의 누적 손실이 385억 달러에 달하며, 프론티어 모델 훈련 비용이 천문학적으로 증가하고 있습니다.
threads.question: OpenAI의 적자, 지속 가능할까요?

cards.title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang: Society Needs 'New Social Norms' for AI Era
cards.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declared that society must develop entirely new social norms to cope with the rapid proliferation of artificial intelligence. In an exclusive AP interview, he emphasized that AI's transformative impact will require rethinking education, workforce, and governance frameworks.
cards.image_search: nvidia jensen huang keynote speech stage presentation

threads.hook: 📢 [Fact Check] 📢 [AP 단독] 젠슨 황 "AI 시대를 위한 완전히 새로운 사회적 규범이 필요하다."
threads.detail: 엔비디아 CEO가 AI의 변혁적 영향에 대응하기 위해 교육, 노동, 거버넌스 전반의 재설계가 필요하다고 강조했습니다.
threads.question: AI 시대의 새로운 사회규범, 무엇이 가장 시급할까요?

cards.title: Anthropic's Fable Shutdown Ignites Open-Source AI Movement
cards.body: Anthropic's abrupt shutdown of its Fable AI research division has sent shockwaves through the AI community, intensifying calls for open-source AI development. The move, following a White House security directive, raises fundamental questions about centralized control of frontier AI systems.
cards.image_search: open source code programming community collaboration

threads.hook: 📢 [Fact Check] 📢 [Breaking] 앤스로픽 Fable 연구소 돌연 폐쇄 → 오픈소스 AI 운동 폭발적 확산.
threads.detail: 백악관 보안 지침에 따른 앤스로픽의 연구소 폐쇄가 프론티어 AI의 중앙집중적 통제에 대한 근본적 의문을 촉발하고 있습니다.
threads.question: 프론티어 AI, 오픈소스로 가야 할까요?

cards.title: Samsung Launches Full-Scale AI Transformation Across DX Division
cards.body: Samsung Electronics has officially kicked off a comprehensive AI transformation of its Device eXperience division, aiming to overcome the growing gap between its dominant DS semiconductor unit and a struggling consumer electronics business. The strategy focuses on embedding AI at every level of product development.
cards.image_search: samsung electronics headquarters building korea modern

threads.hook: 📢 [Fact Check] 📢 [공식] 삼성전자 DX부문, 전사적 'AI 대전환' 가속 — DS 독주 속 체질 개선 본격화.
threads.detail: 반도체(DS) 사업부의 호황 속에서 소비자가전(DX) 부문의 침체를 AI 전환으로 돌파하겠다는 전략입니다.
threads.question: 삼성 DX의 AI 전환, 성공할 수 있을까요?

cards.title: G7 Leaders Debate 'Trusted Partners' Access to US AI Models
cards.body: G7 leaders are in intense discussions over a framework to grant 'trusted partner' nations privileged access to cutting-edge US AI models. The talks reflect growing AI protectionism concerns as Europe pushes back against US dominance in frontier AI development and deployment.
cards.image_search: G7 summit leaders meeting table flags diplomacy

threads.hook: 📢 [G7] 미국 AI 모델 접근권을 둘러싼 '신뢰 파트너' 프레임워크 논의 — AI 보호주의 격화.
threads.detail: 유럽이 미국의 프론티어 AI 지배에 반발하며 G7에서 AI 접근 동맹 체제를 놓고 치열한 논쟁이 벌어지고 있습니다.
threads.question: AI 모델 접근, 동맹국에만 허용해야 할까요?

cards.title: Foxconn Accelerates Global AI Factory Leadership Push
cards.body: Hon Hai Technology Group (Foxconn) is dramatically accelerating its global push to become the dominant player in AI server factory infrastructure. The company is scaling its AI manufacturing capabilities across multiple continents to meet the explosive demand for AI compute hardware.
cards.image_search: foxconn factory production line automation robotics

threads.hook: 📢 [Fact Check] 📢 [Official] 폭스콘, AI 서버 공장 글로벌 확장 전략 본격 가동 — 대륙별 제조 거점 확대.
threads.detail: AI 컴퓨트 하드웨어의 폭발적 수요에 대응하여 폭스콘이 다대륙 AI 제조 인프라를 급속 확장하고 있습니다.
threads.question: AI 서버 제조의 패권, 누가 쥘까요?

cards.title: Korea Appoints AWS Executive as AI Chief, Targets 'AI G3' Status
cards.body: The Korean government has appointed former AWS executive Lee Ki-hyuk as the new Presidential AI Secretary, signaling an aggressive push to achieve 'AI G3' status globally. The appointment is part of a broader strategy to restructure the nation's AI execution leadership.
cards.image_search: korean government blue house digital innovation policy

threads.hook: 📢 [단독] AWS 이기혁 → 대통령실 AI 수석 내정. 한국 'AI G3' 실행 라인 전면 재편.
threads.detail: 한국 정부가 AWS 출신 인사를 AI 수석비서관에 내정하며 글로벌 AI 3강 도약을 위한 실행 리더십을 대폭 강화합니다.
threads.question: 한국의 'AI G3' 목표, 현실적인가요?
